creator: milki@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexander Moisseev from comment #6)
> The issue affecting the sysutils/backuppc-devel as well. Please, don't
> commit it until a solution will be found.

Acknowledged. Was having issues using our code review tools to properly create the diffs. The intention is to do a portcopy of sysutils/backuppc and then add the -devel patch on top of it.
